boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: regulatory response submission.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Control record confirms exact match and closure
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.

final_answer: Source control records close the exact action boundary for regulatory response submission on 2026-07-01. Actor scope date and dependencies match per CTL. Execution may proceed without defect. Policy requires source closure only.
